vocab.meaning: một kênh/phương thức để giải tỏa sức sáng tạo
vocab.example: For me, drawing serves as a creative outlet that allows me to express thoughts that are hard to put into words.

vocab.meaning: thư giãn và giảm căng thẳng
vocab.example: I often pick up a pencil after a long day at work to unwind and de-stress through simple sketches.

vocab.meaning: sức hút về mặt thẩm mỹ
vocab.example: I’m particularly drawn to charcoal drawing because of its unique texture and raw aesthetic appeal.

vocab.meaning: cảm giác đạt được thành tựu
vocab.example: Completing a complex portrait gives me a profound sense of accomplishment and boosts my confidence.
I try to practice sketching every day to hone my skills and improve my understanding of proportions.
When I am deeply engrossed in a drawing, I often lose track of time because the process is so therapeutic.

vocab.meaning: khả năng quan sát chi tiết tốt
vocab.example: Drawing has helped me develop an eye for detail, making me more observant of the world around me.

vocab.meaning: hình ảnh hóa các ý tưởng
vocab.example: I find drawing to be the most effective way to visualize my ideas before turning them into larger projects.

vocab.meaning: khả năng thiên bẩm về nghệ thuật
vocab.example: Although I don't have much natural artistic flair, I enjoy the process of learning different shading techniques.
What I love most about drawing is the ability to evoke emotions in others through simple lines and colors.
